interventions.name: C3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: specification-first review routines that restate required behavior before code evaluation begins

interventions.name: C3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: test-design tasks that require each case to be justified against one normal, edge, or failure condition

interventions.name: C3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: quality-criterion comparison prompts using correctness, readability, robustness, and maintainability labels explicitly

interventions.name: C3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired program reviews applying the same specification-and-test reasoning in a second bounded code context
